meaning: n.<美>电影放映员,幻灯放映员,电视播放员
examples: The projectionist was panning the camera attentively.
Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday night, Tyler is a movie projectionist.
After a few minutes of this, people started calling for the projectionist to sort it out.
Mr Parry started working as a projectionist in a cinema in Felixstowe when he was a teenager.
The family of New Zealand projectionist and film collector Jack Murtagh sent the highly flammable prints to the organisation for safe keeping after his death in 1989.
